ogTitle: Nelsons Plains vs Nemingha: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nelsons Plains and Nemingha.
heading: Nelsons Plains vs Nemingha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nelsons Plains, New South Wales and Nemingha, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nelsons Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Nemingha (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nelsons Plains or Nemingha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nelsons Plains has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Nemingha scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nelsons Plains scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Nemingha scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nelsons Plains or Nemingha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nelsons Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
